p9.gCodeHeader:
;****Build and Slicing Parameters****
;Burn In Layers Number of Layers             = [[burnLayerNumber]] 
;Burn In Layers Layer Thickness              = [[burnLayerHeight]] mm 
;Burn In Layers Cure Time                    = [[burnLayerExposureTime]] ms 
;Burn In Layers Wait Before Print            = [[burnLayerWaitBeforePrint]] ms 
;Burn In Layers Wait After Print             = [[burnLayerWaitAfterPrint]] ms 
;Burn In Layers Wait After Lift              = [[burnLayerWaitAfterLift]] ms 
;Burn In Layers Lift After Print             = [[burnLayerZLiftDistance]] mm 
;Normal Layers Layer Thickness               = [[normalLayerHeight]] mm 
;Normal Layers Cure Time                     = [[normalLayerExposureTime]] ms 
;Normal Layers Wait Before Print             = [[normalLayerWaitBeforePrint]] ms 
;Normal Layers Wait After Print              = [[normalLayerWaitAfterPrint]] ms 
;Normal Layers Wait After Lift               = [[normalLayerWaitAfterLift]] ms 
;Normal Layers Lift After Print              = [[normalLayerZLiftDistance]] mm 
;Normal Layers Lift Speed                    = [[normalLayerLiftSpeed]] mm/mn 
;Normal Layers Bottom Speed                  = [[normalLayerBottomSpeed]] mm/mn 
;Slow Section Height                         = [[slowSectionHeight]] mm 
;Slow Section Lift After Print               = [[slowSectionZLiftDistance]] mm 
;Slow Section Lift Speed                     = [[slowSectionLiftSpeed]] mm/mn 
;Slow Section Bottom Speed                   = [[slowSectionBottomSpeed]] mm/mn
;Resin                                       = [[resin]]
;Number of Layers                            = [[totalLayers]]
;Number of Slices                            = [[totalSlices]]
p9.gCodeEnd:
;********** Footer ******
M106 S0          ; UV off
G4 P0            ; wait for last lift to complete
G1 Z40.0 F150.0  ; lift model clear of resin
G4 P0            ; sync
M18              ; Disable Motors
;<Completed>
p9.name: Free Zone
p9.gCodeStart:
;********** Start ******
G21 ; Set units to be mm
G91 ; Relative Positioning
M17 ; Enable motors
G28 Z ; Auto-home on print
p9.gCodeKill:
;********** Kill Print ******
M106 S0          ; UV off
G4 P0            ; wait for last lift to complete
G1 Z40.0 F150.0  ; lift model clear of resin
G4 P0            ; sync
M18              ; Disable Motors
;<Completed>
p9.gCodeLayer:
;********** Pre-Slice [[layerNumber]] ******
G4 P0 ; Make sure any previous relative moves are complete
;<Delay> [[WaitBeforePrint]]
;********** Layer [[layerNumber]] ******
;<Slice> [[SliceNumber]]
M106 S255 ; UV on
;<Delay> [[exposureTime]]
[[subLayer]]
M106 S0 ; UV off
;<Slice> Blank
;<Delay> [[WaitAfterPrint]]
;********** Lift Sequence [[layerNumber]] ******
G1 Z[[liftDistance]] F[[liftSpeed]]
;<Takes> [[lastMovementTime]]
G4 P0 ; Wait for lift rise to complete
;<Delay> [[WaitAfterLift]]
G1 Z[[bottomDistance]] F[[bottomSpeed]]
;<Takes> [[lastMovementTime]]
